matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers

signals.headline: Game details:** Donovan Mitchell (30 pts), James Harden (28 pts), and Evan Mobley (25 pts) combined for 83 points in Cle
signals.raw: Game details:** Donovan Mitchell (30 pts), James Harden (28 pts), and Evan Mobley (25 pts) combined for 83 points in Cleveland's wire-to-wire victory, marking their 12th straight playoff win vs. Toronto (an NBA record)[1]. Cavs dominated with 1.37 points per possession on 46 ISOs by Mitchell/Harden[4].

signals.headline: Series context:** Raptors down 0-2, averaging 20 turnovers and 109 points/game (vs
signals.raw: Series context:** Raptors down 0-2, averaging 20 turnovers and 109 points/game (vs. 13.7 TOs/114.6 pts in regular season); Game 3 Thursday in Toronto[2][3]. Coach Rajakovic backs Jakob Poeltl/Ingram for rebound; rookie Colin Murray Boyles noted as underguarded[2][3]. This resolves short-term markets on Cavs advancing or covering series spreads[1][4].
